data.title: World Chess Plc Announces Total Voting Rights Update
data.description:
World Chess PLC ( (GB:CHSS) ) has shared an announcement.

World Chess Plc has announced that as of 28 February 2025, its issued share capital consists of 715,108,659 Ordinary Shares, each with one voting right, with no shares held in treasury. This total number of voting rights is crucial for shareholders to determine their interest in the company under the Financial Conduct Authority’s rules. This update is significant for stakeholders as it clarifies the company’s shareholding structure, potentially affecting investment decisions and shareholder notifications.

More about World Chess PLC

World Chess Plc is a London-based chess gaming and entertainment company and the official commercial partner of the Fédération Internationale des Échecs (FIDE). The company has organized FIDE Championship Matches in the USA and the UK and has been pivotal in revolutionizing the sport by securing significant media partnerships. World Chess is also known for developing Armageddon, a chess league designed for prime-time television, and operates the FIDE Online Arena, the exclusive official chess gaming platform.

YTD Price Performance: 26.67%

Average Trading Volume: 319,156

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: iCandy Interactive Reports Financial Turnaround Amid Revenue Decline
data.description:
The latest update is out from iCandy Interactive Ltd ( (AU:ICI) ).

iCandy Interactive Ltd reported a 3% decrease in revenue for the year ending December 31, 2024, totaling $25,369,775. Despite the revenue drop, the company achieved a net profit of $381,564, a significant turnaround from the previous year’s loss of $13,180,640. This improvement is reflected in the profit per share, which rose to 0.029 cents from a loss of 1.01 cents last year. The company’s adjusted EBITDA also showed a substantial increase, indicating improved operational efficiency and financial health.

More about iCandy Interactive Ltd

iCandy Interactive Ltd operates in the digital entertainment industry, focusing on the development and publishing of mobile games and digital content. The company targets a global market with its interactive and engaging gaming products.

YTD Price Performance: -5.00%

Average Trading Volume: 578,828

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$24.33M

data.title: MPACT Management Ltd. Amends Multi-Currency Facility Agreement
data.description:
The latest update is out from Mapletree Commercial ( (SG:N2IU) ).

MPACT Management Ltd., the manager of Mapletree Pan Asia Commercial Trust, has announced an amendment to its multi-currency facility agreement, extending its tenure and increasing the facility to S$400 million. This move is significant as it involves conditions that could trigger a mandatory prepayment event, potentially affecting up to S$5,972.7 million in borrowings, highlighting the strategic financial maneuvers MPACT is undertaking to manage its debt and maintain its market position.

More about Mapletree Commercial

Mapletree Commercial is a company involved in the management of commercial properties, focusing on providing real estate investment services. It operates under the trust deed structure and is part of the Mapletree Investments Pte Ltd group, which is known for its significant presence in the real estate sector.

data.title: China Everbright’s Subsidiary Releases Financial Statements
data.description:
China Everbright ( (HK:0165) ) just unveiled an announcement.

China Everbright Limited announced that its subsidiary, Ying Li International Real Estate Limited, has published its unaudited condensed interim consolidated financial statements for the six months and full year ended 31 December 2024. This announcement reflects the company’s ongoing commitment to transparency and regulatory compliance, potentially impacting investor confidence and market positioning.

More about China Everbright

China Everbright Limited is a company incorporated in Hong Kong with limited liability, and its stock is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The company is involved in various sectors, with a focus on financial services and investment management. Ying Li International Real Estate Limited, a subsidiary of China Everbright, operates in the real estate sector and is listed on the Mainboard of the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited.

data.title: Critical Resources Announces Director Change
data.description:
Critical Resources Ltd ( (AU:CRR) ) has provided an update.

Critical Resources Limited announced the cessation of Robert Martin as a director effective February 28, 2025. The notice details Martin’s interests in securities, including ordinary shares and options held directly and through entities where he is a director and shareholder. This change in directorship may influence the company’s governance and strategic direction, potentially impacting stakeholder interests.

More about Critical Resources Ltd

Critical Resources Limited operates in the resources industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is primarily involved in the extraction and management of critical minerals, which are essential for various industrial applications.

data.title: BT Group Announces Total Voting Rights for February 2025
data.description:
BT Group plc ( ($GB:BT.A) ) just unveiled an update.

BT Group plc announced that as of 28 February 2025, its capital comprised 9,968,127,681 ordinary shares with voting rights, with 11,290,418 held as treasury shares. This brings the total number of voting rights to 9,956,837,263, a figure important for shareholders to determine their notification obligations under the FCA’s rules.

More about BT Group plc

BT Group plc is a leading telecommunications company, providing a wide range of services including broadband, mobile, and fixed-line services. It operates primarily in the UK but has a significant presence in other markets as well.

data.title: TSH Resources Bhd Executes Share Buy-Back
data.description:
TSH Resources Bhd. ( (SG:TSH) ) just unveiled an announcement.

TSH Resources Bhd announced a share buy-back transaction involving the purchase of 730,000 shares at prices ranging from 1.180 to 1.220 Malaysian Ringgit per share, with a total consideration of 880,858.33 MYR. The shares will be retained in treasury, contributing to a cumulative total of 34,010,200 treasury shares, representing 2.46129% of the company’s total issued shares. This move could potentially enhance shareholder value and indicate confidence in the company’s financial health.

More about TSH Resources Bhd.

TSH Resources Bhd is a company operating in the agricultural sector, primarily focused on the cultivation and production of palm oil. The company is engaged in the plantation industry, with a market focus on palm oil products.

data.title: EPI (Holdings) Limited Announces Capital Reorganisation Plan
data.description:
EPI (Holdings) Limited ( (HK:0689) ) has provided an update.

EPI (Holdings) Limited has announced a Special General Meeting to discuss a proposed Capital Reorganisation. The reorganisation involves consolidating every ten existing shares into one consolidated share and reducing the issued share capital significantly. This move aims to streamline the company’s share structure and potentially enhance its financial flexibility, with the changes subject to necessary regulatory approvals.

data.title: NatWest Group Voting Rights Reduced as Treasury Sells Shares
data.description:
NatWest Group ( (GB:NWG) ) just unveiled an update.

NatWest Group has announced a reduction in its voting rights held by His Majesty’s Treasury to 5.93%, following the disposal of 85,193,767 ordinary shares. This change reflects the ongoing execution of the Treasury’s trading plan, which was initially announced in July 2021 and extended in April 2023, potentially impacting the company’s governance and shareholder structure.

More about NatWest Group

NatWest Group plc is a major banking and financial services company based in the United Kingdom. It provides a wide range of services including personal and business banking, insurance, and investment services, primarily focusing on the UK market.
